payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Partial view of an off-white, scalloped fabric table lamp shade with decorative fringe and a cream-colored base partially visible at the lower edge; lamp is edge-cropped and appears to be a small bedside/table lamp producing soft warm light, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
